2605.30716.title: Simple Token-Efficient Vision-Language Model for Case-level Pathology Synoptic Report Generation
2605.30716.paper_summary: Generating clinically useful pathology reports for pathology cases from whole-slide images (WSIs) is challenging due to gigapixel resolution, long visual-token sequences, and the complexity of case-level reasoning, where a single case may contain multiple WSIs with heterogeneous tissues and ambiguous findings. We present a simple token-efficient vision--language model for case-level synoptic report generation that remains practical under constrained GPU memory. Our architecture follows a minimal three-component design: a frozen pathology patch encoder, a lightweight two-layer MLP vision-language aligner, and a large language model decoder, with an explicit WSI marker token to separate slides within a case. Training proceeds in two supervised stages: (1) aligner-only WSI captioning using heterogeneous WSI-text pairs, and (2) case-level supervised fine-tuning on case-report pairs for structured report generation. To reduce sequence length, we represent each slide using $512 \times 512$ patches at $5\times$ magnification, which reduces the average sequence length by up to $64\times$ times compared to the commonly used $20\times$ patches. Combined with efficient training techniques, we enable practical training with only half a NVIDIA H100 GPU. Across both training stages, our approach achieves high ROUGE-L/METEOR/BLEU-4 scores while being substantially more efficient in memory and runtime. In AI-based evaluations, our model is consistently preferred over strong baselines. Extensive ablations characterize performance-efficiency trade-offs and identify simple choices that improve robustness in multi-WSI settings. Overall, this work provides a strong, reproducible baseline for efficient pathology report generation, lowering the barrier to multi-WSI VLM research under limited compute.
2605.30716.paper_summary_zh: 生成臨床有用的病理報告，針對來自全片影像（WSIs）的病理案例，由於其千億像素的解析度、長視覺標記序列以及案例層級推理的複雜性，面臨挑戰，其中單一案例可能包含多個具有異質組織和模糊發現的WSIs。我們提出了一種簡單的令牌高效視覺-語言模型，用於案例層級的綜合報告生成，並在受限的GPU記憶體下保持實用。我們的架構遵循最小的三組件設計：一個凍結的病理補丁編碼器、一個輕量級的兩層MLP視覺-語言對齊器，以及一個大型語言模型解碼器，並使用明確的WSI標記令牌來區分案例內的幻燈片。訓練分為兩個監督階段進行：（1）僅對齊器的WSI標題生成，使用異質的WSI-文本對，和（2）針對案例報告對的案例層級監督微調，以進行結構化報告生成。為了減少序列長度，我們使用$512 \times 512$的補丁，並在$5\times$放大倍率下表示每個幻燈片，這使得平均序列長度比常用的$20\times$補丁減少了最多$64\times$倍。結合高效的訓練技術，我們僅用半個NVIDIA H100 GPU實現了實用的訓練。在兩個訓練階段中，我們的方法在ROUGE-L/METEOR/BLEU-4分數上都取得了高分，同時在記憶體和運行時間上顯著更高效。在基於AI的評估中，我們的模型始終比強基線更受青睞。廣泛的消融實驗描述了性能-效率的權衡，並確定了簡單的選擇，以提高多WSI設置中的穩健性。總體而言，這項工作為高效的病理報告生成提供了一個強大且可重複的基線，降低了在有限計算資源下進行多WSI VLM研究的門檻。
2605.30716.author: Zhiyuan Yang et.al.
2605.30716.authors: Zhiyuan Yang, Jiahao Cheng, Vincent Quoc-Huy Trinh, Mahdi S. Hosseini
